subcodes.title: Words spoken on 1913-01-19 in London
subcodes.first_line: It is prejudice that has uprooted families. It is prejudice that has led people to shed each other's blood.
subcodes.first_line_orig: از تعصب است که خانمانها ویران میشود از تعصب است که خونها ریخته می‌گردد از تعصب است
subcodes.subjects: @consumption of meat; vegetarianism; diet, @progress and the continual ascent of material civilization, @unity in diversity, @literal interpretation, @prejudice; racial prejudice; class distinction
